# ProActive Pixels

> AI & Automation for Local Service Businesses — we find the revenue leaks, fix them fast, and keep them fixed.

ProActive Pixels helps local service businesses (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, cleaning, landscaping, and similar trades) stop losing revenue to missed calls, slow follow-up, and operational gaps. We implement AI voice agents and business automation systems — most clients are live within 72 hours. We don't sell software subscriptions. We find the problem, build the solution, and maintain it.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://proactivepixels.com/): Overview of services and how we work
- [Services](https://proactivepixels.com/services/): Full breakdown of what we do — AI voice agents, automated follow-up sequences, lead capture, and ongoing maintenance
- [Work](https://proactivepixels.com/work/): Case studies and real results from client engagements
- [About](https://proactivepixels.com/about/): Background and philosophy — built by an operator, for operators
- [Blog](https://proactivepixels.com/blog/): Insights on AI, automation, and operations for service businesses

- [After-Hours Calls: The Revenue Leak Most Service Businesses Ignore](https://proactivepixels.com/blog/after-hours-calls/)
